headline: Global Payments (GPN) Stock Could Be 37.6% Undervalued as Its Merchant Pivot Draws Focus
summary: Recent Performance Puts Global Payments Under the Microscope Global Payments (GPN) is drawing investor attention after a period of weaker share performance, with the stock down about 9% over the past month and roughly 6% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Global Payments. At a share price of $66.88, Global Payments has seen short term share price momentum fade, with the stock down in recent weeks and a weaker total shareholder return over the past year and beyond as investors...
